memory.summary: The assignment is urgent, but skipping lunch with the group feels risky. I'll join them quickly to avoid friction, then rush back to work.

desires: Finish the analysis section immediately to secure the grade before the 18:00 deadline, as academic success is my primary metric of worth.
Avoid any awkwardness or conflict with cohort_3 by keeping lunch interactions brief and superficial so I can return to work without social friction.
Get a quick dopamine hit from checking off tasks to relieve the rising stress of the looming deadline, even if it means skipping proper rest later.

goals.description: Reject cohort_3's lunch invitation immediately via text to avoid social friction and return to the analysis section.
goals.rationale: Value priority on 'academic' (0.5) outweighs 'relationships' (0.15). Avoidant trait dictates minimizing interpersonal interaction to prevent awkwardness, even if it means being blunt or disappearing. Impulsive nature prioritizes immediate task continuity over long-term relationship maintenance.

goals.description: Complete the assignment analysis section within the next hour to secure the grade before the 18:00 deadline.
goals.rationale: Primary metric of worth is academic success. Short planning horizon and high procrastination bias mean I will focus entirely on the looming deadline now rather than planning for rest or future consequences.

goals.description: Skip the scheduled meal with others to maximize work time.
goals.rationale: Consistent with avoiding conflict and prioritizing the immediate task. The 'impulsive' tendency to seek a dopamine hit from finishing tasks overrides the routine need for a break.

agent.last_reasoning: (a) Advances 'academic' priority by rejecting social friction immediately (avoidant). (b) Prevents awkward face-to-face rejection; text is direct enough for my low assertiveness but protects focus time from the impulsive urge to just disappear without explanation.
